title: setaria pilifera
intro: Setaria pilifera, also known as black millet, is an annual grass native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Setaria pilifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. Setaria pilifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
